item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 56s “I didn't expect it because I don't feel it. I don’t hear it.
“It was my fault, I was in shock
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 56s “I didn't expect it because I don't feel it. I don’t hear it.
“It was my fault, I was in shock and I missed three darts at a double after this because I didn't know what happened."
Krzysztof Ratajski on being accused of clicking his flights in his bout against Danny Mostrar más 8

item.title: stuartpykesport: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 1min Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 32min BREAKING: Arsenal fans have been offered a trip
item.description:
Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 1min Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 32min BREAKING: Arsenal fans have been offered a trip to space after defeat to Man City.
18+ GambleAware 36

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 5min The first Polish player to appear at the Crucible
His opponent had already won Worl
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 5min The first Polish player to appear at the Crucible
His opponent had already won World titles by the time he was born! 5 231
